recommendations.title: Ride Like a Girl
recommendations.overview: The story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup.

recommendations.title: Mallrats
recommendations.overview: Both dumped by their girlfriends, two best friends seek refuge in the local mall. Eventually, they decide to try and win back their significant others and take care of their respective nemeses.

recommendations.title: The Best of Me
recommendations.overview: A pair of former high school sweethearts reunite after many years when they return to visit their small hometown.

recommendations.title: The Choice
recommendations.overview: Travis and Gabby first meet as neighbors in a small coastal town and wind up in a relationship that is tested by life's most defining events.

recommendations.title: Udaan
recommendations.overview: Upon returning to his industrial hometown, a young man must decide whether to follow his own dreams or acquiesce to his father's plans for his future.

recommendations.title: Blue Jay
recommendations.overview: Meeting by chance when they return to their tiny California hometown, two former high-school sweethearts reflect on their shared past.

recommendations.title: The Fall Guy
recommendations.overview: Fresh off an almost career-ending accident, stuntman Colt Seavers has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Miss March
recommendations.overview: A young man awakens from a four-year coma to hear that his once virginal high-school sweetheart has since become a centerfold in one of the world's most famous men's magazines. He and his sex-crazed best friend decide to take a cross-country road tri

recommendations.title: 20th Century Girl
recommendations.overview: In 1999, a teen girl keeps close tabs on a boy in school on behalf of her deeply smitten best friend – then she gets swept up in a love story of her own.
